data.body: AC amendment: Extracted type-specific processors must be placed as separate modules inside plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ (created by prerequisite task 4387-30cb). Each processor type becomes its own .py file (e.g., ticket/process_create_event.py). Add re-export statements to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py. Original ticket-reducer.py becomes a thin dispatcher loop. Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py && ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/*.py | grep -v __init__
